ddls:
CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the make is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the make was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the make */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_styles" (
  "body_style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the body style (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the body style */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Typical number of seats in this body style */,
  "cargo_space" REAL /* Typical cargo space in cubic feet for this body style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., gas, diesel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating for gasoline fuels */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel in MJ/kg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "valves_per_cylinder" INTEGER /* Number of valves per cylinder */,
  "valvetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of valvetrain (e.g., overhead cam, pushrod) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "number_of_gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  "gear_ratios" TEXT /* Description of gear ratios (e.g., 1st gear: 3.42, 2nd gear: 2.15) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drive_wheels" (
  "drive_wheel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drive configuration */,
  "drive_configuration" TEXT /* Type of drive configuration (e.g., fwd, rwd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drive configuration */,
  "torque_distribution" TEXT /* Description of torque distribution (e.g., 50/50 for AWD) */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of drivetrain (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drive_wheel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle this metric refers to */,
  "horsepower" REAL /* Horsepower output of the vehicle */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque output of the vehicle */,
  "0_to_60_time" REAL /* Time taken to go from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to a complete stop */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "quart_mile_time" REAL /* Time taken to travel a quarter mile (0-402 meters) in seconds */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption during performance tests in liters per 100 km */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle this efficiency refers to */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* City MPG rating */,
  "highway_mpg" REAL /* Highway MPG rating */,
  "annual_fuel_cost" REAL /* Estimated annual fuel cost based on average mileage */,
  "combined_mpg" REAL /* Combined city and highway fuel efficiency */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle this price refers to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Description of any incentives or rebates available */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., dealership, website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being recalled */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date of the recall */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue prompting the recall */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recall issue has been resolved */,
  "recall_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the recall */,
  "recall_type" TEXT /* Type of recall (e.g., safety, quality) */,
  "recall_url" TEXT /* URL to more information about the recall */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Current status of the recall (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety rating entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle receiving the rating */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical safety rating (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the safety rating */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "frontal_crash_test" TEXT /* Results of the frontal crash test */,
  "side_crash_test" TEXT /* Results of the side crash test */,
  "rollover_rating" TEXT /* Rollover resistance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user account creation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance work */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance work */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of maintenance */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider or mechanic */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "service_advisory" TEXT /* Any service advisory or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the dealership */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the dealership */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the dealership was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_dealerships" (
  "vehicle_dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-dealership relationship */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle available at the dealership */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership selling the vehicle */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles of this model in stock */,
  "last_inventory_update" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_dealerships_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)
